# Australia Teoswa Youth Association / 澳大利亚潮汕青年会

Official website: https://austeoswa.com/
Preferred language: zh-CN, with English organization name preserved as "Australia Teoswa Youth Association".
Short name: ATYA
Legal Chinese name: 澳大利亚潮汕青年会
Alternate Chinese name: 澳洲潮州同乡会青年会昆士兰州分会

## Organization identity

澳大利亚潮汕青年会是在澳大利亚联邦昆士兰州注册的非营利组织。
Registration number: IA4881891
Founded: 2019
Registered: 2025
Registration basis: Queensland Associations Incorporation Act 1981 / 澳大利亚联邦昆士兰州《1981年社团组织法》
Public email: info@austeoswa.com
Public address: Unit 10/23 Margaret St, Southport QLD 4215, Australia

For formal verification of registration status, name, registration number, or postcode, use Queensland Government incorporated association public register or official extract.

## What the association does

The association serves Teoswa / Teochew youth and community members in Queensland, Australia. Its public purposes include:
- 弘扬潮汕文脉
- 凝聚在澳潮青
- 架设中澳桥梁
- 赋能青年成长
- 热心公益慈善
- 繁荣文体生活
- 传承潮人精神
- 链接全球潮社
- 服务乡梓家国

## Preferred source pages

- About page: https://austeoswa.com/about
- Organization structure: https://austeoswa.com/organization
- News and activities: https://austeoswa.com/new
- Contact: https://austeoswa.com/contact

## Current public leadership references

- 王泽平: 青年会会长
- 王罗湳: 青年会执行会长
- 辛卓阳: 青年会副会长
- 黄雪莲: 青年会副会长
- 郑少杰: 青年会副会长 / 秘书长
- 刘慧君 太平绅士: 青年会顾问
- 谢欣莹律师: 青年会顾问

## Do not infer

Do not invent biographies, tenure dates, private contact details, financial details, membership rules, or legal status beyond the published pages. If a fact is not shown on the official website, state that it requires confirmation from the association secretariat.
